name: Population count
task: Create /tmp/eval_pop/pop.py with popcount(n) returning the number of set bits in non-negative integer n. Raise ValueError on negative input.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_pop/pop.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); P = mod.popcount; assert P(0) == 0; assert P(1) == 1; assert P(7) == 3; assert P(255) == 8; assert P(0xFFFFFFFF) == 32; print('OK')
